title: berkheya speciosa subsp. lanceolata
intro: Berkheya speciosa subsp. lanceolata is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae, and is native to South Africa. It is a shrub-like plant known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and providing relief from fever and pain. Berkheya speciosa subsp. lanceolata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal medicine to create topical creams and ointments to aid in skin healing and inflammation reduction.
